description: Animates a child view through a sequence of numeric phase values, applying opacity for each phase.

values.description: Array of numbers cycled as phase values; default [0.0, 1.0]

trigger.description: What initiates each animation cycle; default 'onAppear'

timerInterval.description: Timer interval in seconds for 'onTimer' trigger; default 1.0

stateKey.description: State key watched for 'onStateChange' trigger; increment its Int value to fire; default 'counter'

animation.description: Animation curve spec; type must be one of: linear/easeIn/easeOut/easeInOut/spring/interactiveSpring/smooth/bouncy/timingCurve

states.description: stateKey state watched for onStateChange trigger; increment Int value to fire
